title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, King, Marco, Chopper, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: The Earth- shaking power of a yonko...!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would've thought Lord Kaido could do something as outrageous as this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Huh? I'm on fire but...it doesn't burn.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flames are just at the right temperature to suppress the virus!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have made all the preparations to produce the antibodies... come quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you!! I can focus better inside the tower!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WOAH!! It's a pack of ice demons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ooh my!! Run away you two!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's take care of this all at once...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BOSS OMASA IS BACK TO HIS SENSES!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just as you said, it's drawing out their body heat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "They will start turning into ice demons again when they run out of stamina!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you!! Myag!!!! Are you okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! You gullible Bums!! Hurry up and get the Antibody back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no way the enemy will save your asses!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: huh?.. so in the end, it's like we thought....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I have a handle on the situation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want to go to the roof, I can fly you there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys too! You aren't here to fight small fry, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But we have to help chopper...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry Mister Skeleton!! Well Protect Mister racoon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE YAKUZA BOSSES!! WELL LEAVE IT TO YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give me the Antibody!! I'm screwed if I lose that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mister X Drake?!!! So he's really gone over to the enemy's side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you really consider me your ally...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leave this floor to me and go on ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aligning yourself with the winning side...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 66 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
